TypeError: LSTMCell.construct() missing 1 required positional argument: 'hx'

llm_operation.reason: PyTorch LSTMCell expects input tensor of shape (batch_size, input_size), but test input has shape [2, 3] while input_size=10 → mismatch causes 'input has inconsistent input_size: got 3 expected 10'. MindSpore LSTMCell requires two inputs: x and hx=(h_0, c_0), but original test case only provides x; missing hx tuple causes 'missing 1 required positional argument: hx'. Per docs: PyTorch LSTMCell(input_size, hidden_size, bias=True) is called as cell(input, (h_0, c_0)); MindSpore LSTMCell(input_size, hidden_size, has_bias=True) is called identically as cell(x, (h, c)). Thus both frameworks require: (1) input tensor shape must be (batch_size, input_size), so shape must be [batch_size, 10]; (2) hidden state tuple (h_0, c_0) with shape [batch_size, hidden_size] = [batch_size, 20]. We fix by setting input shape to [2, 10] (matching input_size), and adding consistent hx=(h, c) tensors of shape [2, 20] for both frameworks. Also align parameter names: PyTorch uses 'bias', MindSpore uses 'has_bias'; both default to True, so omitting is safe, but we explicitly set for clarity and equivalence.

TypeError: LSTMCell.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'hx'

llm_operation.reason: 原始测试用例错误地将 'hx'（LSTM的初始隐藏状态）作为构造函数参数传入，但根据PyTorch和MindSpore文档，LSTMCell.__init__() 仅接受 input_size、hidden_size、bias/has_bias（及dtype），不接受 hx 或 x。hx 和 x 是前向调用时的输入参数（即 net(x, hx)），而非初始化参数。因此，原始用例混淆了构造函数与前向调用的参数职责，导致两者均报错 'got an unexpected keyword argument \'hx\''.修复方式：将 'hx' 和 'input'/'x' 从构造参数中移除，改为在前向调用中提供；同时确保构造参数严格符合各自文档要求：PyTorch用 'bias'，MindSpore用 'has_bias'，且二者语义等价。
